meta.title: Rent-to-Own for Rideshare & Delivery Drivers | Rent With Heldy
meta.description: A Rent-to-Own path built for Uber, Lyft, DoorDash, Uber Eats, and Instacart drivers. Start with a 90-day Qualifying Period. Programs customized to the vehicle and your situation.

hero.imageAlt: Two SUVs parked along a Miami waterfront at golden hour with the downtown skyline and palm trees in the background
hero.title: Drive Today. Own Tomorrow.
hero.subtitle: Get access to a reliable vehicle for Uber, Lyft, DoorDash, and more while working toward ownership of the vehicle you depend on.
hero.tagline: A practical path to earning now and building toward the car you drive for a living.

howItWorks.subtitle: A clear path built around your schedule as a driver — starting with a 90-day Qualifying Period.

buildOwnership.title: Show Consistency

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about the Rent-to-Own program.

items.question: Who is the program for?
items.answer: It's built for gig and delivery drivers — Uber, Lyft, Empower, DoorDash, Uber Eats, Instacart, and similar platforms. If you drive for a living and want a reliable vehicle, it's for you.

items.question: Can I drive for Uber, Lyft, or delivery apps?
items.answer: Yes. Our Rent-to-Own vehicles are chosen to meet the requirements of the major rideshare and delivery platforms in South Florida, including Uber, Lyft, DoorDash, Uber Eats, and Instacart.

items.question: How does the Qualifying Period work?
items.answer: Every applicant begins with a 90-day Qualifying Period designed to confirm consistent income and determine the right long-term program fit. During the Qualifying Period, drivers demonstrate consistent income and responsible vehicle use.

items.question: Do I need perfect credit?
items.answer: No. The program is designed for gig workers and focuses on driving history and income consistency rather than traditional credit scoring alone.

items.question: How much does it cost?
items.answer: Programs are customized based on the vehicle and your individual situation, so there's no one-size-fits-all weekly price. Tell us how you drive and our team will put together the right structure for you.

items.question: How does the path toward ownership work?
items.answer: After the Qualifying Period, our team works with you on the right long-term program and the path toward ownership. Details vary based on the vehicle and your situation, and we'll walk you through them directly.

items.question: What happens if I stop participating?
items.answer: You can return the vehicle. We'll walk you through your options and any next steps based on where you are in the program.

apply.title: Find your Rent-to-Own match
apply.subtitle: Tell us a bit about yourself and a member of our team will reach out to walk you through the next steps.
